purpose: Resolve master/raw-cache ambiguity by pinning the 05-20 parent candidate to the exact commit that contains the replacement evidence.

verified_fields.daily_entry.evidence[3]: AOW-2026-05-20-EVIDENCE-001: receipt-backed process move creating the 05-20 specific evidence intake layer; not proof of an external fog vector.

review_method_rule: For final workflow review, Grok must inspect the commit-pinned target, not a floating raw master cache.
canon_line: Floating master can lag. Commit-pinned receipts settle the board.
